result: Completed cartography: mapped 22 plugin-related files across 4 packages. Plugin system uses only 2 IPC channels (config CRUD). DesktopPluginApi (from external npm package) has slots/store/lifecycle but no transport. Need to add PluginTransport interface + Electron/Browser impls + wiring.

Created 3 files, modified 6 files. PluginTransport interface + transport field added to SDK. ElectronPluginTransport uses window.api.* bridge. Main process handlers follow existing ipc-store pattern. Transport wired with namespace prefixing, invoke, destroy, and cleanup. Typecheck passes (0 errors in changed files).
